docket_entries.description: (404/MAS) MILTON KATZ WITH PET. RICHARD LOPEZ WITH RESP. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. RESP ATTENDED AND PET NOT ATTEND ORIENTATION AS HE DOES NOT SPEAK ENGLISH WELL. PARTIE
S SENT TO FCS FOR MEDIATION. STIPULATION REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD. RESP'S LAST NAME SHOULD BE CORRECTED TO BE "CAMPOS." PARTIES TO HAVE JOINT
ATE AS FOLLOW: PET TO HAVE EVEN YEARS AND RESP TO HAVE ODD YEARS FOR CHRISTMAS, THANKSGIVING, JULY 4TH, LABOR DAY AND RESP TO HAVE EVEN YEARS AND PET
S=$700.00/MN COMMENCING 8/1/00. PET SHALL PAY ONE-HALF OF DOCUMENTED CHILDCARE COSTS AND UNCOVERED MEDICAL/DENTAL EXPENSES. RESP TO RESERVE ISSUE OF
ALLOCATION OF DEBT. PARTIES MUST EXCHANGE DECLARATION OF FINAL DISCLOSURE AND PROVIDE APPROPRIATE DOCUMENTATION. PARTIES SWORN AND VOIR DIRED BY
COUNSEL AS TO AGREEMENT. COURT ACCEPTS STIPULATION AS ORDER OF COURT. RESP TO PREPARE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE #1742
